description: Compact and easy to park – ideal for city runs and quick trips around Port of Spain or Chaguanas. A fuel-efficient favourite among budget-conscious renters in Trinidad.
Spacious compact hatchback with flexible seating — a great choice for small families or couples heading to Maracas Bay or the Caroni Bird Sanctuary.
Eco-friendly hybrid hatchback — one of the most fuel-efficient cars on Trinidadian roads. Perfect for city driving and highway runs with low running costs.
A practical station wagon with generous boot space — great for longer stays or trips to the beach with luggage. Widely used across Trinidad for family errands and travel.
Reliable comfort and style, suitable for both business and leisure. One of the most trusted sedans in Trinidad — perfect for corporate trips or weekend getaways.
An economical sedan widely seen in TT with smooth handling and comfortable seating. Great for everyday use whether heading to San Fernando or touring the island.
A sleek, modern sedan offering extra space and comfort. The Elantra is a popular choice for professionals and visitors exploring Port of Spain and surrounds.
Compact yet versatile, combining comfort with great fuel economy. A go-to budget rental in Trinidad for solo travellers and couples exploring the island.
A stylish mid-range sedan with extra comfort for longer drives. The Cerato is well-equipped and a firm favourite on Trinidadian rental fleets.
Affordable and efficient with just the right space for city or weekend use. The Soluto offers great value for money and is seen across rental fleets island-wide.
Compact SUV with high ground clearance — perfect for families and road trips from Port of Spain to Toco or down to Cedros. A top pick on Trinidad rental fleets.
Sporty and reliable compact SUV — ideal for urban driving and off-road adventures. A popular choice for exploring the Northern Range or heading to Blanchisseuse.
Modern compact crossover with turbocharged engine and excellent fuel efficiency. One of the newest additions to Trinidad rental fleets — offered by Toyota's own T-Go! service.
Stylish and spacious SUV — excellent for road trips and family outings. The Creta is growing rapidly in popularity across Trinidadian car rental fleets.
A versatile SUV offering comfort, power, and cargo space. Available on major Trinidad rental fleets and great for everything from airport pickups to beach runs at Mayaro.
A 7-seater SUV with flexible seating and modern comfort. Ideal for larger groups exploring Trinidad — from Chaguanas to Toco or the Asa Wright Nature Centre.
Spacious 7-seater minivan — ideal for airport transfers, group outings, and corporate events across Trinidad. One of the most practical large-group rentals available.
The workhorse of group transportation in Trinidad. Widely used for corporate shuttles, church groups, school trips and Carnival season travel across the island.
An entry-level sedan offering spacious interiors and excellent value for money. A staple at Piarco Airport rental desks — popular with visitors and locals alike.
A reliable compact SUV with great all-round performance. The ASX handles both Port of Spain traffic and rural roads with ease — a solid mid-range rental option.
A light and economical sedan featured on Toyota's own T-Go! rental service in Trinidad. Easy to drive, cheap to run, and perfect for first-time visitors to the island.
A stylish hybrid crossover SUV popular among upscale renters in Trinidad. The Vezel combines fuel efficiency with a modern design — great for city and highway use.
A capable mid-size SUV perfect for island adventures. Whether heading to the Aripo Savanna or cruising the highway to San Fernando, the X-Trail handles it all with ease.
A top-selling SUV in Trinidad with a bold design and premium features. The Tucson is a preferred pick for corporate rentals and family vacations across T&T.
One of the most in-demand SUVs in Trinidad. The RAV4 combines rugged capability with premium comfort — perfect for long drives to Toco, Valencia, or the south of the island.
